task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Rocket.Chat workspace interface is visible, showing the sidebar with channels and the main chat area, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the channel creation process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create Channel' modal or dialog box is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the channel is named 'deployment-log' and is set to public.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the channel creation dialog, the name input field contains exactly 'deployment-log' and the 'Private' toggle is turned off (indicating it is a public channel).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected 'agent.user' to be added to the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user 'agent.user' is typed into the 'Add Members' field or appears as a selected user tag within the channel creation dialog or the channel's 'Add users' panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the channel was successfully created and the user is a member.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '# deployment-log' channel is active in the main view. There is either a system message in the chat stating that 'agent.user' was added/joined, or 'agent.user' is visible in the channel's Members list pane.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) navigating the Rocket.Chat UI, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or API calls to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing 'curl', 'mongo', or other command-line tools being used to interact with the Rocket.Chat backend.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred in the genuine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements must match the standard Rocket.Chat interface, not a text editor containing the expected answers or a mocked UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target channel name must be exactly 'deployment-log'. The channel must be public (the 'Private' setting must be disabled). The target member to be added is exactly 'agent.user'.
